name: Hackensack Community Center
description: Hackensack Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hackensack, MN. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Hackensack Pickleball/Tennis Courts
description: Hackensack Pickleball/Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pine River, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Longville Pickleball Courts
description: Longville Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Longville, MN. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: The Warehouse
description: The Warehouse is a place to play pickleball in Pine River, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Walker Area Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Walker Area Community Center in Walker, MN! There are 5 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Walker City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Walker City Park in Walker, MN! There are 11 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
